pageSizes.name: OPFS_PAGE_SIZE
pageSizes.description: Fixed OPFS page size for index and renderer page files.

memoryRegions.label: Token ring buffer
memoryRegions.notes: Streaming JSON input from OPFS and the host shim.

memoryRegions.label: String/dict table
memoryRegions.notes: Dictionary-coded names, categories, process ids, and thread ids.

memoryRegions.label: Index page LRU cache
memoryRegions.notes: Demand-paged from OPFS by the columnar index.

memoryRegions.label: LOD pyramid page cache
memoryRegions.notes: Demand-paged from OPFS by later renderer work.

memoryRegions.label: Render scratch
memoryRegions.notes: Per-frame compositing and transient draw preparation.

memoryRegions.label: Bump-allocator heap
memoryRegions.notes: Short-lived allocations; modules request extension through `grow_heap(pages)`.

memoryRegions.label: Wasm stack + globals
memoryRegions.notes: Stack, globals, and module-private runtime state.

memoryBudgets.name: MEM_INITIAL_BYTES
memoryBudgets.description: Minimum initial memory for the v0.1 layout.

memoryBudgets.name: MEM_INITIAL_PAGES
memoryBudgets.description: Minimum initial memory in WebAssembly pages.

memoryBudgets.name: MEM_WORKING_TARGET_PAGES
memoryBudgets.description: 600 MiB working target in WebAssembly pages.

memoryBudgets.name: MEM_HEAP_CEILING_PAGES
memoryBudgets.description: 1 GiB heap ceiling in WebAssembly pages.

TOKEN_RECORD_BYTES.description: Parser token output record byte length.

COLD_RELOAD_TARGET_TRACE_BYTES.description: v0.1 mobile target trace size used to scale cold-reload parity check budgets.

COLD_RELOAD_TARGET_BUDGET_MS.description: Maximum cold-reload time budget for the v0.1 mobile target trace size.

COLD_RELOAD_MIN_BUDGET_MS.description: Minimum cold-reload check budget for small local fixtures where process startup noise dominates.

INDEX_TARGET_ENCODED_BYTES_PER_EVENT.description: Maximum average compact index payload bytes per event.

fields.name: INDEX_PAGE_HEADER_BUCKET_START_OFFSET
fields.description: Index page header byte offset of the inclusive page timestamp start.

fields.name: INDEX_PAGE_HEADER_BUCKET_END_OFFSET
fields.description: Index page header byte offset of the inclusive page timestamp end.

fields.name: INDEX_PAGE_HEADER_RECORD_COUNT_OFFSET
fields.description: Index page header byte offset of the encoded record count.

fields.name: INDEX_PAGE_HEADER_DECODE_HINTS_OFFSET
fields.description: Index page header byte offset of the decode-hints bitfield.

INDEX_DECODE_HINT_COMPACT_SLICES.description: Decode-hints bit marking a compact slice page.

INDEX_DECODE_HINT_PARTIAL.description: Decode-hints bit marking an unfinished page or LOD bucket.

INDEX_DECODE_HINT_TRACK_ID_SHIFT.description: Number of bits to shift a track id into or out of the decode-hints bitfield.

INDEX_COLUMN_ENTRY_BYTES.description: Byte length of one compact index column directory entry.

fields.name: INDEX_DIRECTORY_COLUMN_COUNT_OFFSET
fields.description: Compact page directory byte offset of the column-count field.

fields.name: INDEX_DIRECTORY_BYTES_OFFSET
fields.description: Compact page directory byte offset of the directory byte-length field.

fields.name: INDEX_DIRECTORY_FIRST_ENTRY_OFFSET
fields.description: Compact page directory byte offset of the first column entry.

fields.name: INDEX_COLUMN_ENTRY_BYTE_LENGTH_OFFSET
fields.description: Column directory entry byte offset of the encoded column payload length.

INDEX_QUERY_RESULT_FIELD_BYTES.description: Byte length of one u32 field in an index query result row.

fields.name: INDEX_QUERY_RESULT_START_TS_OFFSET
fields.description: Query result row byte offset of the slice start timestamp.

fields.name: INDEX_QUERY_RESULT_DUR_OFFSET
fields.description: Query result row byte offset of the slice duration.

fields.name: INDEX_QUERY_RESULT_NAME_ID_OFFSET
fields.description: Query result row byte offset of the name dictionary id.

fields.name: INDEX_QUERY_RESULT_DEPTH_OFFSET
fields.description: Query result row byte offset of the nesting depth.

fields.name: INDEX_QUERY_RESULT_CAT_ID_OFFSET
fields.description: Query result row byte offset of the category dictionary id.

fields.name: INDEX_QUERY_RESULT_COLOR_OFFSET
fields.description: Query result row byte offset of the resolved color.

fields.name: INDEX_QUERY_RESULT_PARTIAL_OFFSET
fields.description: Query result row byte offset of the per-row partial-page flag.
